# Composition Recipes

Use recipes before designing page-level UI from individual components.

## Settings Page

When:

A page needs title/actions, grouped settings, local notices, and save/cancel commands.

Use:

- PuPageHeader
- PuCellGroup
- PuCell
- PuInlineNotice
- PuButton

## Form Page

When:

A page collects user input and shows validation or helper text.

Use:

- PuForm
- PuFormItem
- PuInput
- PuTextarea
- PuCheckbox
- PuPicker
- PuButton

## File Submission

When:

Users need to attach files, drag/drop files, or add file URLs.

Use:

- PuForm
- PuFormItem
- PuFileUpload
- PuFilesUpload
- PuInlineNotice
- PuButton

## Read-only Details

When:

A page presents facts, metadata, status, and secondary actions.

Use:

- PuPageHeader
- PuCard
- PuDescriptionList
- PuDescriptionItem
- PuTag
- PuButton

## Empty Or Loading Region

When:

A data region is loading, empty, or has no search results.

Use:

- PuSkeleton
- PuSpinner
- PuEmptyState
- PuInlineNotice
- PuButton

## Focused Overlay Workflow

When:

A task should happen in a modal dialog or side drawer.

Use:

- PuDialog
- PuModal
- PuDrawer
- PuForm
- PuButton
- PuInlineNotice
